findings.summary: The implementation plan omits the required workspace lint/test gate `pnpm turbo run lint test` from PR readiness verification.
The SoT synchronization list omits `PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md` review/update even though the plan changes the Codex MCP guide and pod runtime-path defaults.

checks_reviewed.evidence: Baseline identified as ab3bb5483db20137f15caca9eadfde15ca90012e; worktree showed untracked .evidence/wm/.
Reviewed the target plan and prior xhigh NO_GO review with line-numbered source references.

checks_reviewed.command: nl -ba AGENTS.md REPO_OPERATIONS.md PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT.md docs/CODEX_MCP_ENVIRONMENT.md mobile-app-dev-team/04-skills-and-agents-matrix.md mobile-app-dev-team/09-pod-native-openclaw-skills/README.md mobile-app-dev-team/16-pod-environment-bootstrap.md mobile-app-dev-team/17-orbstack-pod-config-values.md mobile-app-dev-team/18-orbstack-pod-config-setup-runbook-plan.md scripts/validate-team-doc.mjs scripts/validate-repo-operations.mjs
checks_reviewed.evidence: Reviewed requested SoT files and validators in read-only mode; findings cite local path:line references.

checks_reviewed.command: pnpm run validate:team-doc && pnpm run validate:repo-operations && pnpm run test:runtime && pnpm run test:local-harness && pnpm turbo run lint test
checks_reviewed.evidence: Not executed because this is a read-only plan review before implementation; these are implementation/final PR gates and must be run after the planned source changes.

checks_reviewed.command: live OrbStack/OpenClaw boram-* pod preflight, mobile-mcp visual QA, EAS, Stitch, Railway, Atlassian, GitHub branch-protection checks
checks_reviewed.evidence: Not applicable to this local implementation-plan review; the plan correctly treats live external actions as future human-gated evidence.

residual_risks: No live boram-* pod evidence was provided or executed in this review.
No human-owned credential, platform account, Google Cloud project, Expo/EAS project, Railway auth, or store credential status was verified live.
The path migration may expose additional current-doc or validator references during implementation; historical evidence should remain unchanged unless a current validator explicitly requires it.
Repo-local gates do not prove OrbStack/OpenClaw behavior, mobile-mcp/device behavior, EAS, Stitch, Railway, Jira, Confluence, GitHub branch protection, or production release readiness.
